mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) as comment_count FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id
AND p.type = #{type}
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.status = #{status}
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
ORDER BY comment_count DESC, p.create_time DESC
ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
